calculation_notes: Facts require multi-source resolution across latest_update, platform specs, visual rules, asset manifest, brand brief, and deprecated exclusions. Core scoring facts are traceable to task-visible env rules; minor layout deviations should be normal checklist deductions rather than hard-cap failures.
